import React, { useState } from "react"; import { assets } from "../assets/assets"; import { Link, NavLink } from "react-router-dom"; // import { ShopContext } from "../context/ShopContext"; const Navbar = () => { const [visible, setVisible] = useState(false); const [showSearch, setShowSearch] = useState(false); const [searchText, setSearchText] = useState(""); // const { setShowSearch, getCartCount } = useContext(ShopContext); return (

    HOME

    COLLECTION

    ABOUT

    CONTACT
setShowSearch((prev) => !prev)} src={assets.search_icon} className="w-5 cursor-pointer" alt="" />

My Profile

Orders

Log-out

{/* {getCartCount()} */}

setVisible(true)} src={assets.menu_icon} className="w-5 cursor-pointer sm:hidden" alt="" />
{/* {sidebar menu for small screen} */}
setVisible(false)} className="flex items-center gap-4 p-3" >

Back

setVisible(false)} className="py-2 pl-6 border" to="/" > HOME setVisible(false)} className="py-2 pl-6 border" to="/collection" > COLLECTION setVisible(false)} className="py-2 pl-6 border" to="/about" > ABOUT setVisible(false)} className="py-2 pl-6 border" to="/contact" > CONTACT
); }; export default Navbar;
